creator: flurry123@gmx.ch
text:
(In reply to Gleb Popov from comment #2)

Hi, fuse module is loaded by rc.conf:

$ cat /boot/loader.conf
autoboot_delay="1"
boot_mute="YES"
loader_logo="none"


$ cat /etc/rc.conf
...
dbus_enable="YES"
xdm_enable="YES"
kld_list="fusefs"
background_dhclient="YES"
cupsd_enable="YES"
devfs_system_ruleset="system"
